name: 21Shares Solana ETF
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION OF THE TRUST The Trust is an exchange-traded fund that issues common shares of beneficial interest (the Shares) that trade on the Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc. (the Exchange) under the symbol TSOL. The Trust is a passive investment vehicle that does not seek to generate returns beyond tracking the price of SOL tokens, the native digital asset of the Solana blockchain (SOL). The Trusts investment objective is to seek to track the performance of SOL, as measured by the performance of ...
